summary: Backend: 21/21 tests passing after fixing MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug across 5 POST endpoints. Landing page renders correctly with all 6 module cards and Bissal masthead. CRITICAL: Frontend cannot reach backend due to misconfigured REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pointing to a different host than the served origin, combined with CORS wildcard+credentials incompatibility - this blocks all authenticated frontend flows.

minor.issue: All 5 insert handlers returned 500 because motor's insert_one mutates the dict with an ObjectId _id which then breaks JSON encoding. FIXED by popping _id after insert_one in each handler.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend calls https://issue-resolver-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/api/auth/me (from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) while the app is served from https://3d9fc8e5-b121-436b-b526-ad7f54355a14.preview.emergentagent.com. Browser blocks with: 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin header must not be wildcard * when credentials mode is include'. Result: useAuth never authenticates, /dashboard redirects to landing, nav-* test ids are absent.

backend/server.py sets allow_origins='*' AND allow_credentials=True. Browsers reject this combination. Must echo the specific request origin (or list of allowed preview origins) when credentials are used.

issues: Beautiful typewriter editorial layout with Courier Prime, 6 module cards visible, Sign in with Google button visible — design quality good.

action_items: Verify/update frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to match the actual preview origin (https://3d9fc8e5-b121-436b-b526-ad7f54355a14.preview.emergentagent.com) — note this is normally protected but it currently points to a different host than where the app is served.

Fix CORS in backend/server.py: replace allow_origins='*' + allow_credentials=True with a regex/list of allowed origins (or use allow_origin_regex='.*preview\.emergentagent\.com'). Browser refuses wildcard+credentials.
Retest /dashboard, sidebar nav, and all 6 module submission flows after the above two fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 POST handlers were returning 500 due to ObjectId leak — pattern was reused; consider a tiny helper insert_doc(coll, doc) that pops _id automatically.
CORS wildcard with credentials=True is a foot-gun; should use env-driven allowed origins.
get_current_user reads cookie but cookie is set with SameSite=None+Secure cross-site — combined with CORS misconfig, the cookie will likely also be dropped by browsers; Bearer header path works.
server.py is 617 lines; nearing the 700-line split threshold — consider splitting modules (waste/water/tax/currency/journal/skills) into separate routers.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (added doc.pop('_id', None) after each insert_one — 5 places)
/app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (new pytest suite covering 21 tests across all 6 modules + auth)

success_rate.frontend: landing OK; dashboard/modules unreachable due to CORS/env mismatch — not tested end-to-end

test_credentials: Seeded MongoDB test_database: user_id='test-user-bissal', session_token='test_session_bissal_token', email='test.bissal@example.com'. Use as Bearer token or session_token cookie.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 user + 1 session into test_database.users and test_database.user_sessions for auth-gated API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses Bearer token 'test_session_bissal_token'. All 21 backend tests pass against current server. Frontend dashboard + module pages could not be UI-tested because frontend env points to wrong host and CORS blocks credentialed cross-origin calls. Once REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and CORS are fixed, run the Playwright flow to verify nav-waste/water/tax/currency/journal/skills selectors appear and that waste-submit/water-export/tax-export-pdf/journal-submit/skills-submit work.
rca of the issue: Two production-impacting bugs were identified. (1) ObjectId 500 errors: motor's insert_one mutates the supplied dict to attach an ObjectId at key '_id'; the handler then returned that dict and FastAPI's jsonable_encoder failed with 'vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute'. Mitigated by popping '_id' after each insert. Repro: POST /api/waste/listings with Bearer token returned 500 before fix, 200 after. (2) Frontend cannot reach backend: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/.env is set to https://issue-resolver-pro.preview.emergentagent.com while the actual preview origin is https://3d9fc8e5-b121-436b-b526-ad7f54355a14.preview.emergentagent.com, and backend CORS is wildcard + allow_credentials=True. Browser blocks XHRs with 'wildcard origin not allowed with credentials'. Fix the env URL and update CORS to a specific/regex origin.
